notes: Gap reconciliation: V3-EXQ-353 (PASS, DLAPTOP-4.local, 2026-04-15) merged from per-machine file into monolithic runner_status.json. Total entries now 495.

2 ONBOARD smoke tests (V3-ONBOARD-smoke-EWIN-PC, V3-ONBOARD-smoke-ree-cloud-1) are machine setup tests, not scientific experiments -- excluded from error analysis.

Investigation found it was immediately followed by V3-EXQ-008r2 (FAIL, MRO init fix) and V3-EXQ-008r3 (FAIL, larger scale), both completed same day (2026-03-17), using the older 'rN' run-variant naming convention. The scientific question (SD-003 larger world) was pursued to a scientific conclusion and is fully superseded by the SD-003 redesign (z_harm_s counterfactual pipeline, EXQ-205 PASS).
All other 49 ERROR IDs have addressed chains: successors exist in runner_status.json ending in PASS, FAIL, or UNKNOWN (scientific conclusion reached, even if negative).
No new fix scripts are needed. EXQ ID range 419-428 reserved but unused.
